CVE-2022-40023.title: Sqlalchemy mako before 1.2.2 is vulnerable to Regular expression  ...
CVE-2022-40023.description: Sqlalchemy mako before 1.2.2 is vulnerable to Regular expression Denial of Service when using the Lexer class to parse. This also affects babelplugin and linguaplugin.
